Author: FeriusDMS
Name: MonstersMap
Punchline: Search and locate monsters on the map with ease.
Description: Find any monster in Eorzea! Enter a monster name and get instantly flagged on the map with a minimap icon showing the location. Perfect for hunts, gathering, or exploration.
Changelog:
-0.1.3
  Fixed monster search returning no results: correctly resolve BNpcName via parallel sheet lookup (Level.Object.RowId)
  Fixed search results including city NPCs, dungeon mobs, and instanced content: results are now filtered to overworld field zones only
  Fixed incorrect map flag placement: corrected world-to-map coordinate conversion formula
  Results now display in-game map coordinates (X / Y) instead of raw world coordinates
-0.1.2
  Fix issue where the mod wasn't able to find any monsters
